case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. FRANCES I RAMIREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100075977)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62597759), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. SERVED AUG-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-02-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, FRANCES I
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
